description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a gable roof covered in gray shingles and a rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, and the house sits on a neatly trimmed green lawn. The front facade features a small covered porch with a prominent overhanging roof, supported by simple columns, and a set of double windows beside the main entry door. The windows are symmetrically arranged, with three on the longer side and two on the front, all featuring white frames. The rear and side views show minimal ornamentation, with the back wall being mostly solid and the side wall featuring a row of evenly spaced windows. In front of the house, there are three vertical signboards or display panels, suggesting a possible model home or real estate display context.
description: A single-story suburban house with a gray gable roof, light-colored walls, and a small covered porch, set on a green lawn with symmetrical windows and display panels in front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with a covered porch, double windows, and three display panels on the lawn.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long gable roof and a mostly solid wall with minimal window openings.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a row of three evenly spaced windows and the full length of the gable roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the back door, a small step, and the display panels visible to the right.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a small covered porch, overhanging gable roof, and minimal decorative elements.
